gt_sql: SELECT T1.name, T2.translation FROM sets AS T1 INNER JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.setCode WHERE T2.id = 5 GROUP BY T1.name, T2.translation
pred_sql: SELECT s.name, st.translation FROM sets s LEFT JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode WHERE s.id = 5;
question: What is the name of set number 5 and its translation?
